mapper.insert: insert into bundle(category_id, name, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{status},#{description},#{image},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update bundle
category_id = #{categoryId},
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
status = #{status},
where id=#{id}
